name: 2nd-finance-plan
description: Sistema de planejamento financeiro com foco em acessibilidade (usuária idosa). Vue3 + Quasar / NestJS + Prisma.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm --prefix apps/api run start:dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
